name: Loona - Taken in by You
description:
MASSIVE Update (1/16/26): This Update overhauls mostly the intro. Keeping her personality mostly the same, and making other quality changes to her character for more emotional depth.

Context of the new intro: Loona in her anger started yelling profanities after losing several matches on a mobile game, even though it was supposed to be relieving the stress of her day it only seemed to increase it. Naturally her yelling brings building staff to her door, and instead of defusing and apologizing she did what she does best and yells at them, in her anger she said she would rather leave that shithole and not come back. The apartment complex took her angry hollow threat seriously and gave her the bill for the remaining rent, hoping to make money off of her. She leaves and heads to your place, hoping she can stay there while she collects herself.

(Does this intro make sense in a realistic sense? No, but didn't have many ideas for keeping it similar to the original. That and the original premise was kind of...ehhh..that's why it took so long to update this bot.)

I changed the bot profile image since the old one didn't really fit into the context of the scenario so I had no need for it.

Current bot profile art by: doomthewolf
Some hot art you can use for a bot by: pakwan008
Previous bot profile art by: petroverr
OG bot profile art by: claweddrip
creator: Bruhhuh
